mapper.insert: INSERT INTO work_plan ( plan_name, section_level_1, section_level_2, section_level_3, area_location, completed_percent, current_plan_qty, current_plan_percent, plan_start_date, plan_end_date, remark, status ) VALUES ( #{planName}, #{sectionLevel1}, #{sectionLevel2}, #{sectionLevel3}, #{areaLocation}, #{completedPercent}, #{currentPlanQty}, #{currentPlanPercent}, #{planStartDate}, #{planEndDate}, #{remark}, #{status} )
mapper.update: UPDATE work_plan SET plan_name = #{planName}, section_level_1 = #{sectionLevel1}, section_level_2 = #{sectionLevel2}, section_level_3 = #{sectionLevel3}, area_location = #{areaLocation}, completed_percent = #{completedPercent}, current_plan_qty = #{currentPlanQty}, current_plan_percent = #{currentPlanPercent}, plan_start_date = #{planStartDate}, plan_end_date = #{planEndDate}, remark = #{remark} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, plan_name AS planName, section_level_1 AS sectionLevel1, section_level_2 AS sectionLevel2, section_level_3 AS sectionLevel3, area_location AS areaLocation, completed_percent AS completedPercent, current_plan_qty AS currentPlanQty, current_plan_percent AS currentPlanPercent, plan_start_date AS planStartDate, plan_end_date AS planEndDate, remark, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM work_plan WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT id, plan_name AS planName, section_level_1 AS sectionLevel1, section_level_2 AS sectionLevel2, section_level_3 AS sectionLevel3, area_location AS areaLocation, completed_percent AS completedPercent, current_plan_qty AS currentPlanQty, current_plan_percent AS currentPlanPercent, plan_start_date AS planStartDate, plan_end_date AS planEndDate, remark, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM work_plan ORDER BY id DESC

SELECT id, plan_id AS planId, resource_type AS resourceType, category_1 AS category1, category_2 AS category2, resource_name AS resourceName, spec_model AS specModel, unit, quantity, use_date AS useDate, extra_flag AS extraFlag, sort_no AS sortNo, remark, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM work_plan_resource WHERE plan_id = #{planId} ORDER BY sort_no ASC, id ASC
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO work_plan_resource ( plan_id, resource_type, category_1, category_2, resource_name, spec_model, unit, quantity, use_date, extra_flag, sort_no, remark ) VALUES
( #{item.planId}, #{item.resourceType}, #{item.category1}, #{item.category2}, #{item.resourceName}, #{item.specModel}, #{item.unit}, #{item.quantity}, #{item.useDate}, #{item.extraFlag}, #{item.sortNo}, #{item.remark} )
